headline: Food Technology Engineer
summary: Food Technology Engineer specialising in Food Preservation & Processing of Agricultural Products and Human Nutrition. Meticulous, methodical, and always working with a clear plan for every task. With a continuous learning mindset and a serious attitude towards work, aspiring to make meaningful contributions to projects in the food and nutrition industry. Beyond technical expertise, proficient in advanced Excel (Power Query & Power Pivot) for effective data processing and analysis in real-world work environments.

experience.title: Academic Affairs Officer
experience.company: VTCE Education Investment & Development JSC (VTC Academy)
experience.description: VTC Academy – IT & Design Academy established in 2010, pioneering international-standard education.
highlights: Developed and consolidated the system of regulations, rules, and policies related to Training.
Conducted mid-course and end-of-course surveys; compiled statistics and quality assessment reports on lecturers for each subject.
Managed training operations for ~500 students, 30+ lecturers per term.
Built teaching plans and timetables for all courses and classes.
Received, classified, archived, and managed student records.
Managed lecturer rosters, coordinated teaching invitations, assigned classes, tracked teaching hours, and calculated remuneration.
Planned and organised examinations, supervised exam processes, graded, and published results.
Handled deferrals, withdrawals, re-enrolments, re-examinations, and grade improvements.
Organised graduation ceremonies, diploma presentations, project defences, class/course reviews, and specialised seminars.

experience.title: Training Department Staff
experience.company: Nutrition Research & Consulting Institute – H&H Nutrition (NRECI)
experience.description: One of the leading organisations in nutrition research, consulting, and services.
highlights: Drafted, archived documents and regulations on academic affairs and training policies.
Processed and issued certificates for ~200 trainees per month.
Compiled administrative reports and proposed measures to improve course quality.
Conducted regular lecturer evaluations; managed 6–10 courses simultaneously.
Built teaching plans and timetables for all courses and classes.
Planned and organised examinations, supervised, graded, and published results.

experience.title: Content Contributor
highlights: Wrote 8–10 articles per month about the company's nutrition products.
Created content on fundamental nutrition knowledge for customers.

experience.title: Intern – Food Nutrition Officer
experience.company: MT Food Import-Export Trading & Manufacturing Co., Ltd (Yuthfarm)
experience.description: A bridge company supplying fresh Vegetables & Fruits from farms to domestic and international customers.
highlights: Researched and documented product nutritional content for labelling purposes.
Designed 15 nutritional Vegetable & Fruit combos for one person per day.
Registered self-declared quality certifications for 2 products.
Assisted in product quality control during processing and packaging.

education.institution: Nong Lam University Ho Chi Minh City
education.field_of_study: Food Technology (Major: Food Preservation & Processing of Agricultural Products & Human Nutrition)

certifications: Pedagogical Professional Development – Hanoi National University of Education (2024)
awards: Outstanding Youth Union Member – University Level (2020–2021)
volunteer: Editor – NLO Editorial Board, Nong Lam University (2019–2022)
Head of Communications – Spring Volunteer Campaign 2022
Head of Communications – Green Summer Campaign 2021
